title: Accordion component with expand/collapse sections and multiple styling variants
purpose: Provides a collapsible section UI component that supports single or multiple open sections with different styling options and dark mode support.
module_context: Exports an Accordion component that accepts sections with titles and content, manages expanded state, and applies variant-specific styling classes. Includes a helper AccordionContent component for rendering content.

methods.name: getVariantClasses
methods.normalized_params: (variant: string): { container: string; section: string; header: string; content: string }

steps.content: Select styling classes based on the provided variant type.
Return container, section, header, and content class strings for flush variant.
Return container, section, header, and content class strings for outlined variant.
Return container, section, header, and content class strings for default variant.
Initialize expanded section IDs based on initial section states.
IF the accordion is hidden or has no sections, return null.
Define a toggle handler that updates expanded IDs based on multiple allowed setting.
Apply variant-specific styling classes to container and section elements.
Render each section with its header and content area.
Handle click events on section headers to toggle their expanded state.
Display section content when expanded, with fallback for missing content.
Update the list of expanded section IDs based on current state and multiple allowed setting.
IF multiple sections are allowed, toggle the clicked section in the list.
ELSE if multiple sections are not allowed, clear all expanded sections and expand only the clicked one.
Render string content directly within a paragraph element.
IF content is an object with props and a content property, render that property.
ELSE render the JSON string representation of the content.
